metadata.content: Great milestone day. API v2 is live on staging, dashboard beta approved by Jordan, and the pipeline team got stakeholder buy-in. Next week: external beta prep.
metadata.summary: Milestone day: staging launch, beta approval, stakeholder buy-in

metadata.content: Session wrapping up launch day activities. API v2 on staging, dashboard beta approved, pipeline demo done.
metadata.summary: Session: launch day wrap up

metadata.content: Pipeline team demo went well. Stakeholders were impressed with the 2.3x throughput improvement and real-time monitoring.
metadata.summary: Pipeline demo successful, stakeholders impressed

metadata.content: The docs site analytics show the migration guide is the most visited page this week. Good sign that teams are preparing for v2.
metadata.summary: Migration guide is top visited docs page

metadata.content: Deployed API v2 to staging environment. All health checks green. Webhook callbacks verified. Rate limiter configured.
metadata.summary: API v2 deployed to staging, all checks passing

metadata.content: The data pipeline schema validation rules should be versioned. When source schemas change, we need to support both old and new formats during transition.
metadata.summary: Version schema validation rules for transition periods

metadata.content: Final staging load test results from Alex: 3,100 RPS sustained, p99 at 290ms. Better than yesterday's results after the race condition fix.
metadata.summary: Final load test: 3,100 RPS, 290ms p99

metadata.content: Decided to keep the v1 API running for 6 months after v2 GA. Gives customers enough time to migrate without pressure.
metadata.summary: v1 API sunset: 6 months after v2 GA

metadata.content: Jordan approved the dashboard beta for internal release. Will gather feedback for two weeks before external beta.
metadata.summary: Dashboard beta approved for internal release

metadata.content: Added a banner to the docs site announcing the v2 API beta and linking to the migration guide.
metadata.summary: Docs site banner for v2 API beta announcement

metadata.content: The pipeline monitoring dashboard now shows real-time throughput, error rates, and processing latency. Much better visibility than before.
metadata.summary: Real-time pipeline monitoring dashboard complete

metadata.content: Dashboard beta deployment checklist finalized. 12 items, all checked off except the user feedback widget which ships tomorrow.
metadata.summary: Dashboard beta checklist: 11/12 items done

metadata.content: Alex is running the load test on staging one more time with the latest code. Should have results by noon.
metadata.summary: Alex running final staging load test

metadata.content: Integration test suite: 247 tests passed, 0 failed, 3 skipped (pending webhook callback tests that need a mock server).
metadata.summary: Integration tests: 247 passed, 0 failed, 3 skipped

metadata.content: Final testing day before the API v2 staging launch. Running the full integration test suite and checking all monitoring dashboards.
metadata.summary: Final testing day for API v2 staging launch

metadata.content: Good week overall. API v2 is feature complete for staging, dashboard beta is nearly ready, pipeline throughput doubled, and docs are comprehensive.
metadata.summary: Week summary: API v2 done, dashboard near beta, pipeline 2x, docs comprehensive

metadata.content: Wrote the troubleshooting guide for the Acme API. Covers auth errors, rate limiting, webhook failures, and common integration mistakes.
metadata.summary: API troubleshooting guide completed

metadata.content: Session covered mobile improvements, help tooltips, and webhook retry validation.
metadata.summary: Session: mobile, tooltips, webhook testing

metadata.content: Idea: create a shared component library extracted from the dashboard. Other internal tools could reuse the chart components and filter patterns.
metadata.summary: Extract shared component library from dashboard

metadata.content: The data pipeline is now processing 4.2M records per day up from 1.8M last month. The Spark optimization was the biggest factor.
metadata.summary: Pipeline throughput up to 4.2M/day from 1.8M

metadata.content: Dashboard help tooltips added to all chart components. Each tooltip explains what the chart shows and how to interact with it.
metadata.summary: Help tooltips added to all dashboard charts

metadata.content: Sam finished the API reference docs for all v2 endpoints. Includes request/response examples and error code tables.
metadata.summary: API v2 reference docs complete

metadata.content: Need to add structured logging to all API endpoints. Currently using console.log which makes CloudWatch queries painful.
metadata.summary: Switch from console.log to structured logging

metadata.content: The webhook retry test on staging: simulated 50 failures, all retried correctly with backoff. Max retry time was 47 minutes (under the 1-hour SLA).
metadata.summary: Webhook retry test passed, max time 47min under SLA

metadata.content: Data pipeline DLQ replay tool is working. Tested with 500 failed records, all reprocessed successfully. Added a --dry-run flag.
metadata.summary: DLQ replay tool working, tested with 500 records

metadata.content: The internal docs should have a troubleshooting section for each service. Currently developers dig through Slack history to find solutions.
metadata.summary: Add per-service troubleshooting docs

metadata.content: Improved chart touch targets by making the tooltip trigger area larger on mobile viewports. Also added swipe gestures for date range navigation.
metadata.summary: Improved mobile chart UX: larger touch targets and swipe

metadata.content: Jordan tested the dashboard on mobile. The responsive layout works but the chart tooltips are hard to tap on smaller screens.
metadata.summary: Dashboard mobile: charts need touch-friendly tooltips

metadata.content: Dashboard user preferences: theme, default date range, chart type, and notification settings. Stored in the user profile API.
metadata.summary: Dashboard user preferences spec defined

metadata.content: The pipeline CDC implementation would need Debezium for MySQL change streams. Need to evaluate if the operational complexity is worth it.
metadata.summary: CDC needs Debezium, evaluate operational complexity

metadata.content: Added payload size validation to the batch endpoint. Returns 413 with a clear message about the limit and suggests chunking for large payloads.
metadata.summary: Added 413 payload size validation with chunking suggestion

metadata.content: Alex spotted that the API batch endpoint accepts arrays up to 10K items but the Lambda has a 6MB payload limit. Need to add a size check.
metadata.summary: Batch endpoint needs payload size validation

metadata.content: The dashboard settings page needs role-based access control. Admins can change all settings, viewers can only adjust their own preferences.
metadata.summary: Dashboard settings needs RBAC

metadata.content: Overnight load test results for the API: sustained 2,500 RPS with p99 latency at 340ms. Good enough for launch.
metadata.summary: Load test: 2,500 RPS with 340ms p99 latency

metadata.content: Updated the architecture decision record for the API versioning choice. Added context on why we rejected header-based versioning.
metadata.summary: ADR updated for API versioning decision

metadata.content: Had an idea for the data pipeline: use Change Data Capture from the main database instead of batch ETL. Would give near-real-time analytics.
metadata.summary: CDC from main DB for near-real-time analytics

metadata.content: Session covered race condition fix, CSV export, and webhook staging deployment.
metadata.summary: Session: race condition, export, webhooks

metadata.content: Dashboard beta checklist: activity chart done, filters done, export done, sidebar done. Still need: settings page, user preferences, and help tooltips.
metadata.summary: Dashboard beta progress: 4/7 features done

metadata.content: The pipeline team needs a self-service tool to replay failed records. Building a simple CLI that reads from the DLQ and resubmits.
metadata.summary: Building CLI tool for DLQ replay

metadata.content: Deployed the webhook delivery system to staging. First test: sent 100 events, all delivered within 2 seconds. Retry logic not yet tested.
metadata.summary: Webhook system deployed to staging, 100 events delivered in 2s

metadata.content: Sam suggested we add a versioned API changelog that lives alongside the OpenAPI spec. Each version bump gets a changelog entry.
metadata.summary: Versioned API changelog alongside OpenAPI spec

metadata.content: The API v2 OpenAPI spec is 80% complete. Missing: webhook callbacks, pagination parameters on list endpoints, and error response schemas.
metadata.summary: OpenAPI spec 80% done, missing webhooks/pagination/errors

metadata.content: Wrote a comprehensive test suite for the dashboard filter panel. 23 test cases covering all filter combinations and edge cases.
metadata.summary: Dashboard filter panel test suite: 23 test cases

metadata.content: ETL monitoring alerts should use PagerDuty for critical failures and Slack for warnings. Currently everything goes to Slack.
metadata.summary: Route critical ETL alerts to PagerDuty, warnings to Slack

metadata.content: The docs CI pipeline failed because of a markdown lint error. The linter caught an inconsistent heading hierarchy. Fixed in 2 minutes.
metadata.summary: Docs CI fix: markdown heading hierarchy lint error

metadata.content: Should we add a GraphQL layer in front of the REST API? Would simplify the dashboard's data fetching significantly.
metadata.summary: Consider GraphQL layer for dashboard data fetching

metadata.content: Jordan's feedback on the dashboard: the loading skeletons look great, but the empty state for new users needs more guidance on getting started.
metadata.summary: Dashboard empty state needs better onboarding guidance

metadata.content: Implemented the dashboard CSV export with streaming. Large datasets are chunked to avoid memory issues in the browser.
metadata.summary: Streaming CSV export implemented for dashboard

metadata.content: The pipeline data quality report shows 99.7% valid records over the past week. The 0.3% are all from the same legacy source.
metadata.summary: Data quality at 99.7%, all errors from legacy source

metadata.content: Fixed the race condition by using a conditional write with a unique constraint. DynamoDB's condition expression handles this atomically.
metadata.summary: Fixed race condition with DynamoDB conditional write

metadata.content: Alex found a race condition in the API request handler. Two concurrent requests can create duplicate entries because the uniqueness check and insert are not atomic.
metadata.summary: Race condition: non-atomic uniqueness check causes duplicates

metadata.content: The dashboard data export feature needs to support CSV and JSON formats. PDF can come later.
metadata.summary: Dashboard export: CSV and JSON first, PDF later

metadata.content: Monday planning: this week is focused on getting the dashboard to beta and finalizing Acme API v2 for staging deployment.
metadata.summary: Weekly focus: dashboard beta and API v2 staging

metadata.content: Updated the getting started guide with the new auth flow and error code reference. Sam confirmed it reads well.
metadata.summary: Getting started guide updated with v2 auth and error codes

metadata.content: The docs site should have a status page showing API uptime and incident history. Could integrate with our existing monitoring.
metadata.summary: Add API status page to docs site

metadata.content: Session focused on webhook integration tests and rate limiter improvements for Acme API.
metadata.summary: Session: webhooks and rate limiting

metadata.content: Data pipeline checkpoint system design: store checkpoint offsets in DynamoDB with TTL for automatic cleanup of completed jobs.
metadata.summary: Checkpoint design: DynamoDB with TTL

metadata.content: The ETL pipeline configuration should be externalized to a config file instead of hardcoded in the DAG definition.
metadata.summary: Externalize ETL pipeline configuration
action_items: Create external config file for ETL pipeline

metadata.content: Added Retry-After header to the rate limiter response. Also added X-RateLimit-Remaining and X-RateLimit-Reset headers.
metadata.summary: Added rate limit response headers

metadata.content: Code review feedback from Alex: the rate limiter should return Retry-After header with the reset timestamp. Good catch.
metadata.summary: Rate limiter needs Retry-After header per Alex's review

metadata.content: The dashboard filter panel should persist state in the URL query string. Makes filtered views shareable and bookmarkable.
metadata.summary: Persist dashboard filters in URL query string

metadata.content: Wrote integration tests for the webhook delivery system. Covers successful delivery, retry on failure, and dead letter after max retries.
metadata.summary: Webhook delivery integration tests complete

metadata.content: Jordan wants the dashboard header to show the user's organization name and logo. Need to add an org settings API endpoint.
metadata.summary: Dashboard header needs org branding from new API endpoint

metadata.content: Refactored the Spark aggregation to use reduceByKey instead of groupByKey. Memory usage dropped by 60%.
metadata.summary: Spark aggregation refactor reduced memory 60%

metadata.content: The pipeline Spark job is using too much memory for the aggregation step. Should switch to incremental aggregation instead of collecting all records first.
metadata.summary: Spark job OOM on aggregation, switch to incremental

metadata.content: Added Swagger UI to the internal docs site at /api-explorer. Live interactive docs that use the staging environment.
metadata.summary: Added Swagger UI API explorer to docs site

metadata.content: Sam reported that the API docs examples are returning 401 because the sample API keys expired. Need to set up auto-rotating demo keys.
metadata.summary: Docs example API keys expired, need auto-rotation

metadata.content: Implemented the sidebar navigation component with collapsible sections. Each section loads its content lazily.
metadata.summary: Sidebar nav with collapsible lazy-loaded sections

metadata.content: The dashboard needs a notification center for async operations. When a report takes more than 5 seconds, show progress and notify on completion.
metadata.summary: Add notification center for async dashboard operations

metadata.content: Going with URL path versioning for the API. It is more visible in logs, easier to route at the gateway level, and simpler for consumers.
metadata.summary: Chose URL path versioning for simplicity and visibility

metadata.content: Woke up thinking about the API versioning strategy. URL path versioning (/v2/) is simpler but header-based versioning is more RESTful.
metadata.summary: API versioning: URL path vs header-based

metadata.content: Good progress today. Dashboard chart component done, webhook schema and delivery model agreed, pipeline backfill complete.
metadata.summary: Daily progress: charts, webhooks, backfill

metadata.content: Alex and I reviewed the webhook delivery guarantees. Agreed on at-least-once delivery with idempotency keys for consumers.
metadata.summary: Webhook delivery: at-least-once with idempotency keys

metadata.content: The data pipeline should support replay from any checkpoint. Currently can only restart from the beginning of a failed stage.
metadata.summary: Need checkpoint-based replay for pipeline

metadata.content: Session working on Recharts activity chart and widget layout system for the dashboard.
metadata.summary: Session: chart and layout work

metadata.content: Dashboard widget grid system needs to handle different screen sizes. Using CSS Grid with auto-fill and minmax for responsive layout.
metadata.summary: CSS Grid responsive layout for dashboard widgets

metadata.content: Decided to implement feature flags using LaunchDarkly for the v2 API rollout. Gradual traffic shifting per tenant.
metadata.summary: Using LaunchDarkly for v2 API gradual rollout

metadata.content: The Acme API health check endpoint should include dependency status. Database, cache, and message queue availability.
metadata.summary: Add dependency status to health check endpoint

metadata.content: Wrote runbook for handling data pipeline failures. Covers common failure modes, recovery steps, and escalation procedures.
metadata.summary: Data pipeline failure runbook completed

metadata.content: The internal docs deployment pipeline takes 8 minutes. Most of the time is in the Algolia index rebuild. Should cache unchanged pages.
metadata.summary: Docs deploy too slow, Algolia rebuild needs caching

metadata.content: Jordan suggested adding a dark mode toggle to the dashboard. Not a priority for launch but should design the color system to support it later.
metadata.summary: Dark mode not for launch but design color system to support it

metadata.content: Pipeline backfill job for December data completed. 2.3M records processed, 47 rejected by schema validation. All rejections were from a single source.
metadata.summary: December backfill: 2.3M processed, 47 rejected from one source

metadata.content: Found a memory leak in the dashboard WebSocket connection. The cleanup function in useEffect wasn't closing the connection properly.
metadata.summary: Fixed WebSocket memory leak in dashboard useEffect

metadata.content: The activity chart looks great with stacked bars for different event types. Added tooltip with exact counts on hover.
metadata.summary: Activity chart stacked bars with hover tooltips done

metadata.content: Alex finished the webhook event schema. Includes event type, payload, signature, and retry count in headers.
metadata.summary: Webhook event schema completed by Alex

metadata.content: The webhook retry system needs exponential backoff with jitter. Max 5 retries over 24 hours.
metadata.summary: Webhook retry: exponential backoff with jitter, 5 retries / 24h

metadata.content: Starting implementation of the dashboard activity chart component. Using Recharts after yesterday's evaluation.
metadata.summary: Starting activity chart with Recharts

metadata.content: Reviewed overnight batch job results. All 12 ETL tasks completed successfully. The schema validation caught 3 malformed records cleanly.
metadata.summary: Overnight ETL batch successful, schema validation caught 3 bad records

metadata.content: Data pipeline team needs access to the staging environment for testing. Need to set up IAM roles with least-privilege access.
metadata.summary: Set up staging IAM roles for pipeline team
action_items: Create staging IAM roles for pipeline team

metadata.content: Session wrapping up the analytics query optimization and error code documentation.
metadata.summary: Session: analytics optimization and error codes

metadata.content: The dashboard real-time updates should use Server-Sent Events, not WebSockets. Simpler to implement and sufficient for one-way data flow.
metadata.summary: Use SSE instead of WebSockets for dashboard updates

metadata.content: Deployed the rate limiter config change to staging. Using 100 req/min for standard tier and 1000 req/min for premium.
metadata.summary: Rate limiter config deployed to staging

metadata.content: Sam wants a changelog page on the docs site that auto-generates from git tags. Good idea, should be straightforward with a build plugin.
metadata.summary: Auto-generated changelog from git tags for docs site

metadata.content: Fixed the Algolia search index. Rebuilt with correct field mappings and added a CI step to rebuild on docs deploy.
metadata.summary: Fixed Algolia search, added CI rebuild step
action_items: Verify search works after next deploy

metadata.content: The ETL pipeline monitoring dashboard is showing false positives. The health check is pinging the wrong endpoint after last week's routing change.
metadata.summary: ETL monitoring false positives from wrong health check endpoint

metadata.content: Considering adding OpenAPI spec generation from our TypeScript types. Would keep docs always in sync with the actual API.
metadata.summary: Idea: auto-generate OpenAPI spec from TypeScript types

metadata.content: Wrote a migration guide for v1 to v2 API. Covers all breaking changes, deprecated endpoints, and the new auth flow.
metadata.summary: Completed v1 to v2 migration guide

metadata.content: The docs site search is broken after the Algolia index update. Need to rebuild the index with the new field mappings.
metadata.summary: Docs search broken after Algolia index update

metadata.content: Need to document the new error codes before Alex can implement webhook retries. Blocking dependency.
metadata.summary: Error code docs blocking webhook retry work
action_items: Document error codes for webhook retry system

metadata.content: Realized the token bucket implementation should be at the API Gateway level, not in application code. Saves a Lambda invocation on rejected requests.
metadata.summary: Move rate limiting to API Gateway level

metadata.content: Jordan sent updated mockups. The sidebar navigation is much cleaner. Suggested adding keyboard shortcuts for power users.
metadata.summary: Updated dashboard mockups look good, add keyboard shortcuts

metadata.content: Added composite index on (tenant_id, created_at, type) to the events table. Query time dropped from 4.2s to 180ms.
metadata.summary: Composite index reduced analytics query from 4.2s to 180ms

metadata.content: Investigating slow query on the analytics endpoint. The JOIN across three tables is doing a full scan because the composite index is missing.
metadata.summary: Analytics endpoint slow due to missing composite index

metadata.content: The data pipeline Airflow DAG is getting unwieldy at 47 tasks. Should break into sub-DAGs or switch to a more modular approach.
metadata.summary: Airflow DAG too complex, needs modularization

metadata.content: Defined error code taxonomy for v2 API: 4xx for client errors with machine-readable codes, 5xx with correlation IDs for debugging.
metadata.summary: Error code taxonomy defined for v2 API

metadata.content: Morning standup: Alex is blocked on the webhook retry system, needs the new error codes defined. Jordan finishing dashboard mockups today.
metadata.summary: Standup: Alex blocked on webhooks, Jordan on mockups

metadata.content: End of day. Got the auth middleware mostly done, pagination bug fixed, and started on rate limiter redesign.
metadata.summary: End of day progress update

metadata.content: Data pipeline needs a dead letter queue for failed records. Currently they just get logged and lost.
metadata.summary: Need DLQ for failed pipeline records

metadata.content: Session working on auth middleware refactor. Moved token validation into shared middleware, added request context propagation.
metadata.summary: Auth middleware refactor session

metadata.content: Reviewed pull request from Alex on the batch import endpoint. Good approach but needs retry logic for partial failures.
metadata.summary: PR review: batch import needs retry logic

metadata.content: Fixed the off-by-one error in the pagination cursor. The LIMIT was applied before the cursor filter, so page 2 was missing the first item.
metadata.summary: Fixed pagination cursor off-by-one bug

metadata.content: The dashboard prototype is rendering charts with Chart.js but we should evaluate if Recharts would integrate better with our React stack.
metadata.summary: Evaluate Recharts vs Chart.js for dashboard

metadata.content: Decided to use JWT with short-lived access tokens and refresh tokens for the v2 API. OAuth2 client credentials flow for service-to-service.
metadata.summary: JWT + refresh tokens for v2, OAuth2 CC for service auth

metadata.content: Sam asked if we can add mermaid diagram support to the docs site. Would make architecture docs much clearer.
metadata.summary: Request for mermaid diagram support in docs

metadata.content: Wrote the initial API authentication guide for internal docs. Covers API key rotation, OAuth flow, and service account setup.
metadata.summary: Drafted API authentication guide

metadata.content: Need to add schema validation at the ingestion layer. Right now we just trust the source format and blow up downstream.
metadata.summary: Add schema validation to data ingestion layer
action_items: Add schema validation to ingestion layer

metadata.content: ETL job for customer usage data failed overnight. The S3 source bucket had a schema change in the CSV headers.
metadata.summary: ETL failure due to CSV schema change in source bucket

metadata.content: The current dashboard loads all metrics in a single API call. Should split into separate endpoints for parallel loading.
metadata.summary: Split dashboard metrics into separate API calls

metadata.content: Reviewed the dashboard wireframes from Jordan. The activity chart needs a date range picker, not just preset buttons.
metadata.summary: Dashboard wireframes need date range picker

metadata.content: We should consider using token bucket instead of fixed window for rate limiting. Would handle burst traffic much better.
metadata.summary: Consider token bucket rate limiting algorithm

metadata.content: Alex mentioned that the rate limiter on the /users endpoint is too aggressive. Customers are hitting 429s during batch imports.
metadata.summary: Rate limiter too aggressive on /users endpoint

metadata.content: Starting the new sprint focused on Acme API v2 migration. Need to move all auth endpoints to the new middleware before Friday.
metadata.summary: Sprint kickoff for Acme API v2 auth migration
action_items: Move auth endpoints to new middleware by Friday

metadata.content: Kicked off the week reviewing the API auth flow. Current JWT setup needs refresh token rotation before we can open the beta.
metadata.summary: API auth review: JWT refresh token rotation needed before beta
action_items: Implement refresh token rotation for API auth

metadata.content: Pipeline indexing job is taking 45 minutes for the full dataset. Need to investigate partition strategy — probably need to shard by date.
metadata.summary: Pipeline indexing bottleneck at 45 min for full dataset, investigating date-based sharding
action_items: Investigate date-based sharding for pipeline indexing

metadata.content: Dashboard wireframes for the activity chart are looking good. Going with a stacked bar chart for the project breakdown view.
metadata.summary: Dashboard activity chart: stacked bar chart selected for project breakdown

metadata.content: Updated the API rate limiting docs to include the new tier-based limits. Also added a troubleshooting section for common 429 errors.
metadata.summary: API rate limiting docs updated with tier-based limits and 429 troubleshooting
